codeReview.summary: The feature implementation is complete across multiple commits: 6a83067 (URL helper consolidation), 4e8a484 (grounded_web opt-out UI and persistence), and cf9aa04 (documentation). The handoff now correctly references cf9aa04. All VAL assertions are addressed in the code. Wizard state persistence and grounded-web opt-out persistence are both implemented and wired correctly.

issues.description: The verificationSteps for this feature require manual browser exercises (exercise missing-endpoint, invalid-endpoint, stub-only flows; verify grounded web opt-out persistence; verify wizard-state resume) that cannot be fully validated from code review alone. The handoffs show agent-browser was used for basic checks but detailed manual exercises per the feature's verificationSteps were not explicitly documented. This is a documentation gap, not an implementation gap - the code implementation appears complete.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature spans multiple commits (6a83067, 4e8a484, cf9aa04) that were made by different worker sessions. The final handoff (99b95003) correctly references cf9aa04 as the documenting commit. This multi-commit pattern is appropriate for a consolidation feature but requires careful commit provenance tracking.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Commit 6a83067 consolidates URL helpers; 4e8a484 adds grounded_web opt-out; cf9aa04 documents the complete feature

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-refactor-worker skill exists at .factory/skills/frontend-refactor-worker/SKILL.md and was used by the worker. The skill procedure was followed correctly.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file exists and worker invoked it via Skill tool

sharedStateObservations.observation: The discovery worker service is documented in services.yaml. The grounded_web opt-out is respected by the worker via config.ts normalizeSourceIdList() which checks options.groundedWebEnabled === false.

The grounded_web opt-out implementation uses IndexedDB persistence via UC.saveDiscoveryProfile/getDiscoveryProfile. The checkbox UI exists in both Settings (settingsDiscoveryGroundedWeb) and run modal (dpGroundedWeb). The value flows through buildDiscoveryWebhookPayload into the discovery POST.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: app.js:13707-13708 handles checkbox in Settings; app.js:16179-16180 handles in run modal; app.js:16608-16618 saves preference

addressesFailureFrom: ./discovery-consolidation/scrutiny/reviews/discovery-browser-setup-and-recovery.json (prior review found blocking issues with commit reference and missing VAL-CROSS-006/012 implementation)
summary: The blocking issues from the prior synthesis are addressed: (1) Handoff commitId now correctly references cf9aa04 instead of ac86145. (2) grounded_web opt-out persistence is fully implemented with UI checkboxes in Settings and run modal, IndexedDB persistence via UC.saveDiscoveryProfile/getDiscoveryProfile, and config.ts respects the opt-out. (3) Wizard state persistence is fully implemented via saveDiscoverySetupWizardState/getDiscoverySetupWizardState with resume-at-saved-currentStep behavior in openDiscoverySetupWizard. All VAL assertions (VAL-DISCOVERY-001/002/003/004/005/006/007/008/015/017 and VAL-CROSS-004/005/006/012/014) are addressed in the code. Status: PASS.
